Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.9 
55 
STATE_CODE 
LABEL: 
State code for beneficiary (SSA code) 
DESCRIPTION: The social security administration (SSA) standard 2-digit state code of a beneficiary's residence. 
SHORT NAME: STATE_CD 
LONG NAME: STATE_CODE 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
SSA/CME 
VALUES: 
01 = Alabama 
02 = Alaska 
03 = Arizona 
04 = Arkansas 
05 = California 
06 = Colorado 
07 =
